meta.label: Friction
meta.thesis: Locally fast, globally expensive — fewer parts, tangled and harder to trust.

sourceFiles.label: Source files
sourceFiles.description: Source files (ts/tsx/js/rs/css), excluding tests, config, docs and generated code. Scored on balance.

locTotal.label: Total LOC
locTotal.description: Non-empty lines of source code. Scored on balance — too little means missing structure, too much means bloat.

locBackend.label: Backend LOC
locBackend.description: Lines of back-end / server code (heuristic classification, includes Rust).

todoCount.label: TODO / FIXME
todoCount.description: Occurrences of TODO / FIXME / HACK / XXX markers in source.

anyCount.label: `any` usages
anyCount.description: Uses of the TypeScript `any` escape hatch (`: any`, `as any`, `<any>`).

asUnknownAsCount.label: `as unknown as` casts
asUnknownAsCount.description: Double casts through `unknown` — a strong smell of fighting the type system.

businessRatio.label: Business/boilerplate ratio
businessRatio.description: Share of code that is product logic vs config/generated/barrel boilerplate. Higher = more signal per line.

directDeps.label: Direct dependencies
directDeps.description: Distinct third-party runtime + dev dependencies declared across the variant's manifests.

transitiveDeps.reason: Per-variant transitive resolution not computed offline; wire `pnpm list --json` / `cargo tree` in a later pass.
transitiveDeps.label: transitiveDeps

nxProjects.label: Workspace projects
nxProjects.description: Buildable projects (npm packages + Rust crates). Scored on balance: a monolith is under-modularized, dozens of projects is over-fragmented; the healthy band is in between.

graphNodes.label: Graph nodes
graphNodes.description: Projects in the variant's internal dependency graph. Scored on balance.

graphEdges.label: Graph edges
graphEdges.description: Internal dependency edges between the variant's projects.

graphDensity.label: Graph density
graphDensity.description: Edges / possible-edges — how tangled the internal graph is.

fanInAvg.label: Avg fan-in
fanInAvg.description: Average number of projects that depend on a given project.

fanOutAvg.label: Avg fan-out
fanOutAvg.description: Average number of projects a given project depends on.

fanInMax.label: Max fan-in
fanInMax.description: Most-depended-upon project's fan-in — the blast radius of a change to the busiest hub.

fanOutMax.label: Max fan-out
fanOutMax.description: Highest number of dependencies a single project pulls in.

circularDeps.label: Circular dependencies
circularDeps.description: Import cycles between the variant's own projects (detected from workspace manifests).

bundleJsKb.label: JS bundle (raw)
bundleJsKb.description: Total uncompressed JavaScript shipped to the browser.

bundleJsGzipKb.label: JS bundle (gzip)
bundleJsGzipKb.description: Gzip-compressed JavaScript — the closest proxy to what users download.

bundleCssKb.label: CSS bundle (raw)
bundleCssKb.description: Total uncompressed CSS shipped to the browser.

largestChunkKb.label: Largest chunk
largestChunkKb.description: Size of the single biggest JS chunk (a hydration-cost proxy).

imagesKb.label: Images
imagesKb.description: Total image weight in the build output.

fontsKb.label: Fonts
fontsKb.description: Total font weight in the build output.

distTotalKb.label: Build artifact
distTotalKb.description: Total size of the deployable build output.

buildTimeMs.reason: Opt-in — re-run with --timings to measure `pnpm --filter @signalops/friction-web --filter @signalops/friction-api run build`.
buildTimeMs.label: Build time (cold)
buildTimeMs.description: Wall-clock cold build time (opt-in: run with --timings).

typecheckTimeMs.reason: Opt-in — re-run with --timings to measure `pnpm --filter @signalops/friction-web --filter @signalops/friction-api run typecheck`.
typecheckTimeMs.label: Typecheck time
typecheckTimeMs.description: Time to run the type checker (opt-in).

testTimeMs.reason: Opt-in — re-run with --timings to measure `pnpm --filter @signalops/friction-web --filter @signalops/friction-api run test`.
testTimeMs.label: Test time
testTimeMs.description: Time to run the unit test suite (opt-in).

lintTimeMs.reason: Opt-in — re-run with --timings to measure `pnpm --filter @signalops/friction-web --filter @signalops/friction-api run lint`.
lintTimeMs.label: Lint time
lintTimeMs.description: Time to run the linter / boundary check (opt-in).

variant.ci.build.duration.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.build.duration.label: Variant build time
variant.ci.build.duration.description: Wall-clock cold build of this variant's app(s), measured in the per-variant CI job.

variant.ci.typecheck.duration.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.typecheck.duration.label: Variant typecheck time
variant.ci.typecheck.duration.description: Wall-clock typecheck of this variant, from the per-variant CI job.

variant.ci.lint.duration.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.lint.duration.label: Variant lint time
variant.ci.lint.duration.description: Wall-clock lint / boundary check of this variant, from the per-variant CI job.

variant.ci.test.duration.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.test.duration.label: Variant test time
variant.ci.test.duration.description: Wall-clock unit-test run of this variant (vitest), from the per-variant CI job.

variant.ci.tests.executed.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.tests.executed.label: Tests executed
variant.ci.tests.executed.description: Number of unit tests executed by this variant's suite. Informational (not scored).

variant.ci.tests.passed.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.tests.passed.label: Tests passed
variant.ci.tests.passed.description: Number of passing unit tests. Informational.

variant.ci.tests.failed.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.tests.failed.label: Tests failed

variant.ci.tests.skipped.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.tests.skipped.label: Tests skipped

variant.ci.warnings.count.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.warnings.count.label: CI warnings
variant.ci.warnings.count.description: Warnings parsed from this variant's build/lint/typecheck output (heuristic across tsc/eslint/oxlint/cargo).

variant.ci.errors.count.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.errors.count.label: CI errors
variant.ci.errors.count.description: Errors parsed from this variant's build/lint/typecheck output (heuristic).

variant.ci.ramPeak.build.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.ramPeak.build.label: Build peak RAM
variant.ci.ramPeak.build.description: Peak resident memory of the build step (from /usr/bin/time on the CI runner). Unavailable where the runner lacks GNU/BSD time.

variant.ci.ramPeak.tests.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.ramPeak.tests.label: Test peak RAM
variant.ci.ramPeak.tests.description: Peak resident memory of the test step (from /usr/bin/time).

variant.ci.artifact.distSize.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.ci.artifact.distSize.label: Variant dist size (CI)
variant.ci.artifact.distSize.description: Build-output size measured in the CI job right after build. Informational — `distTotalKb` (bundle collector) is the scored artifact size.

variant.docker.build.duration.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.docker.build.duration.label: Docker build time
variant.docker.build.duration.description: Wall-clock `docker build --no-cache` for this variant's image. Best-effort: `unavailable` if Docker isn't present or has no Dockerfile.

variant.docker.image.size.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.docker.image.size.label: Docker image size
variant.docker.image.size.description: Final image size via `docker image inspect`. The user-facing (web) image where a variant ships several.

variant.docker.layers.count.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.docker.layers.count.label: Docker layers
variant.docker.layers.count.description: RootFS content layers in the image — a proxy for build-cache friendliness.

variant.docker.layer.maxSize.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.docker.layer.maxSize.label: Largest Docker layer

variant.docker.startup.duration.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.docker.startup.duration.label: Container startup
variant.docker.startup.duration.description: Time from `docker run` to the container answering its health endpoint. Best-effort.

variant.docker.healthcheck.status.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.docker.healthcheck.status.label: Container healthcheck
variant.docker.healthcheck.status.description: Whether the started container served its health endpoint (ok/fail). Informational.

variant.docker.healthcheck.duration.reason: No CI artifact — run `pnpm metrics:variant --variant friction` (or the CI matrix job) to produce tools/metrics/results/ci/friction.json.
variant.docker.healthcheck.duration.label: Healthcheck latency
variant.docker.healthcheck.duration.description: Latency of the first successful health request once the container is up. Informational.

lighthousePerformance.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
lighthousePerformance.label: Lighthouse Performance

lighthouseAccessibility.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
lighthouseAccessibility.label: Lighthouse Accessibility

lighthouseBestPractices.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
lighthouseBestPractices.label: Lighthouse Best Practices

lcpMs.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
lcpMs.label: LCP

cls.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
cls.label: CLS

tbtMs.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
tbtMs.label: TBT

speedIndexMs.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
speedIndexMs.label: Speed Index

fcpMs.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
fcpMs.label: FCP

requests.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
requests.label: Initial requests
requests.description: Number of network requests to load the main route.

transferredKb.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
transferredKb.label: Transferred weight
transferredKb.description: Total bytes transferred over the wire for the main route.

co2PerViewMg.reason: No deployed/served URL configured for this variant yet.
co2PerViewMg.label: CO₂ / page view
co2PerViewMg.description: Estimated CO₂ per page view (SWD model from transferred bytes).

runtime.reason: No deployed URLs configured; live probing skipped.
runtime.seam: tools/metrics/collectors/runtime.mjs — probe appUrl/apiUrl for healthcheck + latency percentiles.

frontendErrors.reason: Playwright console/error capture not run in this pass.
frontendErrors.seam: tools/metrics/collectors/playwright.mjs — drive the app, capture console errors/warnings, network errors, table/filter latency.

axe.reason: axe-core run not executed in this pass (Lighthouse a11y score is available).
axe.seam: tools/metrics/collectors/axe.mjs — run @axe-core/playwright, bucket violations by impact.
